# NYC Slice of Life

> NYC Slice of Life is a New York City food events guide specializing in pizza
> pop-ups, curated date ideas, and local dining experiences. The site surfaces
> upcoming pop-up events, maintains a full events calendar, and provides
> detailed information about each event and venue.

> See also: sitemap.xml for a complete machine-readable page index.

## Pages

- [Homepage](https://nycsliceoflife.com/): Discover upcoming NYC pizza pop-ups, curated date ideas, and local food events.
- [Upcoming NYC Pop-ups](https://nycsliceoflife.com/pop-ups.html): Browse all active and upcoming pizza and food pop-up events in New York City.
- [Date Ideas](https://nycsliceoflife.com/date-ideas.html): Curated date ideas in NYC centered on food, dining, and shared experiences.
- [Events Calendar](https://nycsliceoflife.com/calendar.html): Full calendar view of NYC pop-up food events.
- [About Us](https://nycsliceoflife.com/about.html): Learn about NYC Slice of Life and our mission to surface great food experiences.
- [Contact Us](https://nycsliceoflife.com/contact_us.html): Get in touch with the NYC Slice of Life team.

## Optional

- [Privacy Policy](https://nycsliceoflife.com/privacy_policy.html): Site privacy policy and data practices.
